title: scorzonella procera var. pratensis
intro: Scorzonella procera var. pratensis, also known as a type of scorzonera, is a plant species within the sunflower family, native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its edible roots and leaves. The medicinal properties of Scorzonella procera var. pratensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of consuming the plant include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and improve immune function. Scorzonella procera var. pratensis can be prepared as an infusion, tea, or tincture, often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
